steps.title: Identify what the passage focuses on
steps.content: The passage focuses exclusively on how jazz tap developed: its origins in African American communities, its connection to jazz music in the 1920s, and how it evolved alongside jazz through the 1930s-1940s.

steps.title: Match the focus to the purpose statement
steps.content:
The correct answer states the passage “discusses the development of a dance form.” This fits—the text traces jazz tap's origins through its evolution alongside jazz music.

The other choices address topics absent from the passage: why audiences prefer music, how to play instruments, or individual dancer fame.

That is the correct answer.
